<script>
window.REQUIRED_CODE_ERROR_MESSAGE = 'Wähle bitte einen Ländervorwahl aus.';
window.LOCALE = 'de';
window.EMAIL_INVALID_MESSAGE = window.SMS_INVALID_MESSAGE = "Die eingegebenen Informationen sind nicht gültig. Bitte überprüfe das Feldformat und versuche es erneut.";
window.REQUIRED_ERROR_MESSAGE = "Dieses Feld darf nicht leer sein. ";
window.GENERIC_INVALID_MESSAGE = "Die eingegebenen Informationen sind nicht gültig. Bitte überprüfe das Feldformat und versuche es erneut.";

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const overlay = document.getElementById('cooking-popup-overlay');
    const closeBtn = document.getElementById('cooking-popup-close');
    const reopenBtn = document.getElementById('cooking-popup-reopen');
    const newsletterBtn = document.getElementById('newsletter-btn');
    const backIcon = document.getElementById('newsletter-back-icon');
    const page1 = document.getElementById('popup-page-1');
    const page2 = document.getElementById('popup-page-2');
    
    // Cookie functions
    function setCookie(name, value, days) {
        const date = new Date();
        date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
        const expires = "expires=" + date.toUTCString();
        document.cookie = name + "=" + value + ";" + expires + ";path=/";
    }
    
    function getCookie(name) {
        const nameEQ = name + "=";
        const ca = document.cookie.split(';');
        for(let i = 0; i < ca.length; i++) {
            let c = ca[i];
            while (c.charAt(0) == ' ') c = c.substring(1, c.length);
            if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) == 0) return c.substring(nameEQ.length, c.length);
        }
        return null;
    }
    
    // Verwende Cookie statt sessionStorage
    const popupClosed = getCookie('cooking-popup-closed');
    
    // Detect if mobile device
    const isMobile = /Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
    const animationInterval = isMobile ? 15000 : 15000; // 8 Sekunden für Mobile, 15 für Desktop
    
    // Function to trigger animation
    function triggerButtonAnimation() {
        if (reopenBtn.style.display === 'flex') {
            reopenBtn.classList.add('jump-animation');
            // Add a small vibration on mobile if supported
            if (isMobile && navigator.vibrate) {
                navigator.vibrate(50); // Kurze Vibration
            }
            setTimeout(() => {
                reopenBtn.classList.remove('jump-animation');
            }, 1000);
        }
    }
    
    // Start animation interval
    let animationTimer = setInterval(triggerButtonAnimation, animationInterval);
    
    // Show popup initially if not closed before
    if (!popupClosed) {
        setTimeout(() => {
            overlay.classList.add('active');
            showPage1();
        }, 15000);
    } else {
        reopenBtn.style.display = 'flex';
    }
    
    function closePopup() {
        overlay.classList.remove('active');
        reopenBtn.style.display = 'flex';
        setCookie('cooking-popup-closed', 'true', 7); // Cookie für 7 Tage setzen
        showPage1(); // Reset to page 1 when closed
        
        // Restart animation interval if it was cleared
        if (!animationTimer) {
            animationTimer = setInterval(triggerButtonAnimation, animationInterval);
        }
    }
    
    function openPopup() {
        overlay.classList.add('active');
        reopenBtn.style.display = 'none';
        // Clear animation interval when popup is open
        if (animationTimer) {
            clearInterval(animationTimer);
            animationTimer = null;
        }
    }
    
    function showPage1() {
        page1.classList.add('active');
        page2.classList.remove('active');
    }
    
    function showPage2() {
        page1.classList.remove('active');
        page2.classList.add('active');
    }
    
    // Event listeners
    closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closePopup);
    reopenBtn.addEventListener('click', openPopup);
    newsletterBtn.addEventListener('click', showPage2);
    backIcon.addEventListener('click', showPage1);
    
    overlay.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (e.target === overlay) {
            closePopup();
        }
    });
    
    document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
        if (e.key === 'Escape' && overlay.classList.contains('active')) {
            closePopup();
        }
    });

    // Newsletter form functionality
    const form = document.getElementById('popup-sib-form');
    const checkbox = document.getElementById('popup-OPT_IN');
    const emailInput = document.getElementById('popup-EMAIL');
    const submitBtn = document.querySelector('.popup-pasta-submit-btn');
    const successMessage = document.getElementById('popup-success-message');
    const errorMessage = document.getElementById('popup-error-message');
    
    if (form) {
        // Custom validation
        const customErrors = {
            checkbox: '📋 Bitte bestätige die Datenschutzerklärung. Ohne deine Zustimmung können wir dir leider keinen Newsletter senden (DSGVO).',
            email: '📧 Bitte gib eine gültige E-Mail-Adresse ein (z.B. max@beispiel.de).'
        };

        let isSubmitting = false;
        const originalButtonText = submitBtn.textContent;

        function showLoadingState() {
            isSubmitting = true;
            submitBtn.disabled = true;
            submitBtn.style.opacity = '0.8';
            submitBtn.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
            submitBtn.textContent = '⏳ Newsletter wird abonniert...';
        }

        function hideLoadingState() {
            isSubmitting = false;
            submitBtn.disabled = false;
            submitBtn.style.opacity = '1';
            submitBtn.style.cursor = 'pointer';
            submitBtn.textContent = originalButtonText;
        }

        function showSuccessMessage() {
            errorMessage.style.display = 'none';
            successMessage.style.display = 'block';
            successMessage.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
        }

        function showErrorMessage() {
            successMessage.style.display = 'none';
            errorMessage.style.display = 'block';
            errorMessage.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
        }

        // Form submission
        form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            
            if (isSubmitting) return;
            
            // Reset messages
            errorMessage.style.display = 'none';
            successMessage.style.display = 'none';
            
            // Validate
            let isValid = true;
            
            if (!emailInput.value || !emailInput.validity.valid) {
                isValid = false;
            }
            
            if (!checkbox.checked) {
                isValid = false;
            }
            
            if (!isValid) {
                showErrorMessage();
                return;
            }
            
            showLoadingState();
            
            // Submit to Brevo
            fetch(form.action, {
                method: 'POST',
                body: new FormData(form),
                mode: 'no-cors'
            }).then(() => {
                hideLoadingState();
                showSuccessMessage();
                form.reset();
            }).catch(() => {
                hideLoadingState();
                showErrorMessage();
            });
        });
    }
});
</script>


        <script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        // Suche nach Rezept-Containern
        const recipeContainers = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="wprm-recipe-container"], #recipe, .wprm-recipe, .tasty-recipes, .easyrecipe, .recipe-card');
        
        if (recipeContainers.length > 0) {
            // CTA Box HTML erstellen
            const ctaBoxHTML = `
                <div class="recipe-jump-cta" id="recipe-jump-cta">
                    <div class="recipe-cta-content">
                        <div class="recipe-cta-icon">🍴</div>
                        <div class="recipe-cta-text">
                            <span class="recipe-cta-title">Hungrig?</span>
                            <span class="recipe-cta-subtitle">Spring direkt zum Rezept!</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="recipe-cta-buttons">
                            <button class="recipe-cta-button primary" onclick="document.getElementById('recipe-jump-cta').scrollToRecipe()">
                                🍴 Zum Rezept
                            </button>
                            <button class="recipe-cta-button secondary" onclick="document.getElementById('recipe-jump-cta').scrollToNewsletter()">
                                📧 Newsletter
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
            
            // Box nach dem ersten Absatz oder Header einfügen
            const articleContent = document.querySelector('.entry-content, .post-content, article');
            if (articleContent) {
                const firstParagraph = articleContent.querySelector('p, h2, h3');
                if (firstParagraph) {
                    firstParagraph.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', ctaBoxHTML);
                    
                    // Scroll-Funktionen hinzufügen
                    document.getElementById('recipe-jump-cta').scrollToRecipe = function() {
                        // Finde spezifisch den WPRM Container
                        const wprmRecipe = document.querySelector('[id^="wprm-recipe-container"]') || recipeContainers[0];
                        if (wprmRecipe) {
                            // Scrolle mit etwas Offset für bessere Sichtbarkeit
                            const offset = 100; // 100px Offset nach oben
                            const elementPosition = wprmRecipe.getBoundingClientRect().top;
                            const offsetPosition = elementPosition + window.pageYOffset - offset;
                            
                            window.scrollTo({
                                top: offsetPosition,
                                behavior: 'smooth'
                            });
                            
                            // Visuelles Feedback
                            const ctaButton = document.querySelector('.recipe-cta-button.primary');
                            if (ctaButton) {
                                const originalText = ctaButton.innerHTML;
                                ctaButton.innerHTML = '✓ Zum Rezept';
                                ctaButton.style.background = '#10b981';
                                setTimeout(() => {
                                    ctaButton.innerHTML = originalText;
                                    ctaButton.style.background = '';
                                }, 2000);
                            }
                        }
                    };
                    
                    document.getElementById('recipe-jump-cta').scrollToNewsletter = function() {
                        const newsletterBox = document.getElementById('blog-newsletter-box');
                        if (newsletterBox) {
                            newsletterBox.scrollIntoView({ 
                                behavior: 'smooth', 
                                block: 'center'
                            });
                            
                            // Highlight Newsletter Box
                            newsletterBox.style.boxShadow = '0 0 30px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.6)';
                            setTimeout(() => {
                                newsletterBox.style.boxShadow = '';
                            }, 2000);
                        }
                    };
                }
            }
        }
    });
    </script>
    
    <style>
    /* Recipe Jump CTA Box */
    .recipe-jump-cta {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
        border-radius: 12px;
        padding: 20px;
        margin: 30px 0;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
    }
    
    .recipe-jump-cta:before {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        background: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(255,255,255,0.1) 0%, transparent 50%);
        pointer-events: none;
    }
    
    .recipe-cta-content {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 15px;
        position: relative;
        z-index: 2;
    }
    
    .recipe-cta-icon {
        font-size: 40px;
        animation: pulse 2s infinite;
    }
    
    @keyframes pulse {
        0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
        50% { transform: scale(1.1); }
    }
    
    .recipe-cta-text {
        flex: 1;
        color: white;
    }
    
    .recipe-cta-title {
        display: block;
        font-size: 20px;
        font-weight: 700;
        margin-bottom: 4px;
    }
    
    .recipe-cta-subtitle {
        display: block;
        font-size: 14px;
        opacity: 0.9;
    }
    
    .recipe-cta-buttons {
        display: flex;
        gap: 10px;
    }
    
    .recipe-cta-button {
        border: none;
        border-radius: 25px;
        padding: 12px 20px;
        font-size: 15px;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.2s ease;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
    }
    
    .recipe-cta-button.primary {
        background: white;
        color: #667eea;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        flex: 1.2;
    }
    
    .recipe-cta-button.secondary {
        background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
        color: white;
        border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
        flex: 1;
    }
    
    .recipe-cta-button.primary:hover {
        transform: translateY(-2px);
        box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
        background: #f8f9fa;
    }
    
    .recipe-cta-button.secondary:hover {
        background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
        border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
        transform: translateY(-2px);
    }
    
    /* Mobile Responsive */
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .recipe-jump-cta {
            padding: 16px;
            margin: 20px 0;
        }
        
        .recipe-cta-content {
            flex-direction: column;
            text-align: center;
            gap: 12px;
        }
        
        .recipe-cta-icon {
            font-size: 36px;
        }
        
        .recipe-cta-title {
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        .recipe-cta-subtitle {
            font-size: 13px;
        }
        
        .recipe-cta-buttons {
            flex-direction: column;
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .recipe-cta-button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 14px 20px;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        
        .recipe-cta-button.primary,
        .recipe-cta-button.secondary {
            flex: 1;
        }
    }
    
    @media (max-width: 480px) {
        .recipe-jump-cta {
            padding: 14px;
            margin: 15px 0;
        }
        
        .recipe-cta-icon {
            font-size: 32px;
        }
        
        .recipe-cta-title {
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        
        .recipe-cta-subtitle {
            font-size: 12px;
        }
        
        .recipe-cta-button {
            padding: 12px 18px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
    }
    </style>
        <script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        // Newsletter Form HTML
        const newsletterFormHTML = `
            <div class="blog-newsletter-box" id="blog-newsletter-box">
                <div class="blog-newsletter-container">
                    <div class="blog-newsletter-icon">
                        <span>📬</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="blog-newsletter-content">
                        <h3 class="blog-newsletter-title">
                            <span class="title-icon">✨</span>
                            Verpasse keine Rezepte mehr!
                        </h3>
                        <p class="blog-newsletter-subtitle">
                            Erhalte wöchentlich neue Rezepte, Kochtipps und <strong>kostenlose E-Books**</strong> direkt in dein Postfach.
                        </p>
                        
                        <form id="blog-newsletter-form" class="blog-newsletter-form" method="POST" action="https://aa5ab51d.sibforms.com/serve/MUIFAGkXio7mXdGLLFEr2NYd9YnBJuGoTOM1DTUOY9bB3yHfDRuYtQOvOjk1mvbPqUxeKEZII5kegoBq-x3u2kTYVxe2fpuAyXE_geChtVBC2915_o7q1o5Y3SMcfH38AHJo2AsrQRP9nnJ4NQxo78J1chrNQ7-M6nGq2jv3iyckQWrYw-n-wvsVGFBY-_qKSFH5geBX0fcNMVu0">
                            <div class="form-row">
                                <input type="email" 
                                       name="EMAIL" 
                                       class="blog-newsletter-input" 
                                       placeholder="Deine E-Mail-Adresse" 
                                       required>
                                <button type="submit" class="blog-newsletter-button">
                                    <span class="button-text">Kostenlos anmelden</span>
                                    <span class="button-icon">→</span>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <div class="form-checkbox">
                                <input type="checkbox" 
                                       id="blog-newsletter-consent" 
                                       name="OPT_IN" 
                                       value="1" 
                                       required>
                                <label for="blog-newsletter-consent">
                                    Ich akzeptiere die <a href="https://pastaweb.de/datenschutzerklarung/" target="_blank">Datenschutzerklärung</a> und kann mich jederzeit abmelden.
                                </label>
                            </div>
                            <input type="hidden" name="locale" value="de">
                            <input type="text" name="email_address_check" value="" style="display:none;">
                        </form>
                        
                        <div class="blog-newsletter-benefits">
                            <span class="benefit-item">🎁 Gratis E-Books</span>
                            <span class="benefit-item">🍝 Neue Rezepte</span>
                            <span class="benefit-item">💡 Profi-Tipps</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div id="blog-newsletter-success" class="blog-newsletter-message success" style="display:none;">
                            <span class="message-icon">✅</span>
                            <span>Super! Bitte bestätige deine Anmeldung in der E-Mail, die wir dir gesendet haben.</span>
                        </div>

                        <!-- E-Book Info Box -->
                        <div class="blog-ebook-info">
                            <div class="info-icon">ℹ️</div>
                            <div class="info-content">
                                <h4>** E-Book Vorteile für Newsletter-Abonnenten</h4>
                                <p>Als Newsletter-Abonnent erhältst du exklusive Mini-E-Books <strong>1 Monat vor der öffentlichen Veröffentlichung</strong> kostenlos. Diese kostenlosen E-Books werden anschließend auch regulär auf Pastaweb verfügbar gemacht. Kostenpflichtige Premium-E-Books bleiben weiterhin kostenpflichtig.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Privacy Notice -->
                        <div class="blog-privacy-notice">
                            <div class="privacy-header">
                                <svg style="width:20px; height:20px; margin-right: 8px;" viewBox="0 0 63 63">
                                    <path d="M31.54 0l1.05 3.06 3.385-.01-2.735 1.897 1.05 3.042-2.748-1.886-2.738 1.886 1.044-3.05-2.745-1.897h3.393zm13.97 3.019L46.555 6.4l3.384.01-2.743 2.101 1.048 3.387-2.752-2.1-2.752 2.1 1.054-3.382-2.745-2.105h3.385zm9.998 10.056l1.039 3.382h3.38l-2.751 2.1 1.05 3.382-2.744-2.091-2.743 2.091 1.054-3.381-2.754-2.1h3.385zM58.58 27.1l1.04 3.372h3.379l-2.752 2.096 1.05 3.387-2.744-2.091-2.75 2.092 1.054-3.387-2.747-2.097h3.376zm-3.076 14.02l1.044 3.364h3.385l-2.743 2.09 1.05 3.392-2.744-2.097-2.743 2.097 1.052-3.377-2.752-2.117 3.385-.01zm-9.985 9.91l1.045 3.364h3.393l-2.752 2.09 1.05 3.393-2.745-2.097-2.743 2.097 1.05-3.383-2.751-2.1 3.384-.01zM31.45 55.01l1.044 3.043 3.393-.008-2.752 1.9L34.19 63l-2.744-1.895-2.748 1.891 1.054-3.05-2.743-1.9h3.384zm-13.934-3.98l1.036 3.364h3.402l-2.752 2.09 1.053 3.393-2.747-2.097-2.752 2.097 1.053-3.382-2.743-2.1 3.384-.01zm-9.981-9.91l1.045 3.364h3.398l-2.748 2.09 1.05 3.392-2.753-2.1-2.752 2.096 1.053-3.382-2.743-2.102 3.384-.009zM4.466 27.1l1.038 3.372H8.88l-2.752 2.097 1.053 3.387-2.743-2.09-2.748 2.09 1.053-3.387L0 30.472h3.385zm3.069-14.025l1.045 3.382h3.395L9.23 18.56l1.05 3.381-2.752-2.09-2.752 2.09 1.053-3.381-2.744-2.1h3.384zm9.99-10.056L18.57 6.4l3.393.01-2.743 2.1 1.05 3.373-2.754-2.092-2.751 2.092 1.053-3.382-2.744-2.1h3.384zm24.938 19.394l-10-4.22a2.48 2.48 0 00-1.921 0l-10 4.22A2.529 2.529 0 0019 24.75c0 10.47 5.964 17.705 11.537 20.057a2.48 2.48 0 001.921 0C36.921 42.924 44 36.421 44 24.75a2.532 2.532 0 00-1.537-2.336zm-2.46 6.023l-9.583 9.705a.83.83 0 01-1.177 0l-5.416-5.485a.855.855 0 010-1.192l1.177-1.192a.83.83 0 011.177 0l3.65 3.697 7.819-7.916a.83.83 0 011.177 0l1.177 1.191a.843.843 0 010 1.192z" fill="#0ea5e9"></path>
                                </svg>
                                <span style="font-weight: 600; color: #0c4a6e;">Datenschutz & Sicherheit</span>
                            </div>
                            <p class="privacy-text">
                                Wir verwenden Brevo als unsere Marketing-Plattform. Indem du das Formular absendest, erklärst du dich einverstanden, dass die von dir angegebenen persönlichen Informationen an Brevo zur Bearbeitung übertragen werden gemäß den <a href="https://www.brevo.com/de/legal/privacypolicy/" target="_blank">Datenschutzrichtlinien von Brevo</a>.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
        
        // Später ausführen, um sicherzustellen, dass das Rezept geladen ist
        setTimeout(function() {
            // Finde Rezept-Container - spezifische Suche
            const recipeContainers = document.querySelectorAll('.wprm-recipe-container, [id^="wprm-recipe-container"], .wprm-recipe, #recipe');
            
            let newsletterInserted = false;
            
            if (recipeContainers.length > 0) {
                // FALL 1: Rezept vorhanden - Newsletter NACH dem Rezept
                let targetRecipe = null;
                
                // Priorität: WPRM Container mit ID
                const wprmContainer = document.querySelector('[id^="wprm-recipe-container"]');
                if (wprmContainer) {
                    targetRecipe = wprmContainer;
                } else {
                    targetRecipe = recipeContainers[0];
                }
                
                // Newsletter-Box NACH dem Rezept einfügen
                if (targetRecipe) {
                    // Stelle sicher, dass es wirklich nach dem Rezept eingefügt wird
                    if (targetRecipe.nextElementSibling) {
                        targetRecipe.nextElementSibling.insertAdjacentHTML('beforebegin', newsletterFormHTML);
                    } else {
                        targetRecipe.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', newsletterFormHTML);
                    }
                    
                    newsletterInserted = true;
                    console.log('Newsletter-Box wurde nach dem Rezept eingefügt:', targetRecipe);
                }
            } else {
                // FALL 2: Kein Rezept vorhanden - Newsletter NACH dem Inhaltsverzeichnis
                const tocElements = document.querySelectorAll('.ruby-table-contents, .rbtoc, .table-fw, .wp-block-table-of-contents, .toc, #toc, .toc-header');
                
                if (tocElements.length > 0) {
                    // Finde das Hauptelement des Inhaltsverzeichnisses
                    let tocTarget = null;
                    
                    // Suche nach dem übergeordneten Container
                    for (let toc of tocElements) {
                        // Wenn es ein toc-header ist, suche den Parent-Container
                        if (toc.classList.contains('toc-header')) {
                            tocTarget = toc.closest('.ruby-table-contents, .rbtoc, .table-fw') || toc.parentElement;
                        } else {
                            tocTarget = toc;
                        }
                        if (tocTarget) break;
                    }
                    
                    if (tocTarget) {
                        tocTarget.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', newsletterFormHTML);
                        newsletterInserted = true;
                        console.log('Newsletter-Box wurde nach dem Inhaltsverzeichnis eingefügt:', tocTarget);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // Nur Form Handler initialisieren, wenn Newsletter eingefügt wurde
            if (newsletterInserted) {
            
            // Form Handler
            const form = document.getElementById('blog-newsletter-form');
            const successMsg = document.getElementById('blog-newsletter-success');
            const errorMsg = document.getElementById('blog-newsletter-error');
            
            if (form) {
                form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    
                    // Hide messages
                    successMsg.style.display = 'none';
                    errorMsg.style.display = 'none';
                    
                    // Check consent
                    const consent = document.getElementById('blog-newsletter-consent');
                    if (!consent.checked) {
                        errorMsg.style.display = 'flex';
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    // Submit form
                    fetch(form.action, {
                        method: 'POST',
                        body: new FormData(form),
                        mode: 'no-cors'
                    }).then(() => {
                        successMsg.style.display = 'flex';
                        form.style.display = 'none';
                    }).catch(() => {
                        errorMsg.style.display = 'flex';
                    });
                });
            }
        }
        }, 500); // Warte 500ms bis Rezept geladen ist
    });
    </script>

    			<script type='text/javascript'>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>
					<div id="rb-user-popup-form" class="rb-user-popup-form mfp-animation mfp-hide">
			<div class="logo-popup-outer">
				<div class="logo-popup">
					<div class="login-popup-header">
													<span class="logo-popup-heading h3">Welcome Back!</span>
													<p class="logo-popup-description is-meta">Sign in to your account</p>
											</div>
					<div class="user-login-form">
						<form name="popup-form" id="popup-form" action="https://pastaweb.de/wp-login.php" method="post"><div class="login-username">
				<div class="rb-login-label">Username or Email Address</div>
				<input type="text" name="log" required="required" autocomplete="username" class="input" value="" />
				</div><div class="login-password">
				<div class="rb-login-label">Password</div>
				<div class="is-relative">
				<input type="password" name="pwd" required="required" autocomplete="current-password" spellcheck="false" class="input" value="" />
				<span class="rb-password-toggle"><i class="rbi rbi-show"></i></span></div>
				</div><div class="remember-wrap"><p class="login-remember"><label class="rb-login-label"><input name="rememberme" type="checkbox" id="rememberme" value="forever" /> Remember me</label></p><a class="lostpassw-link" href="https://pastaweb.de/wp-login.php?action=lostpassword">Lost your password?</a></div><p class="login-submit">

function b2a(a){var b,c=0,l=0,f="",g=[];if(!a)return a;do{var e=a.charCodeAt(c++);var h=a.charCodeAt(c++);var k=a.charCodeAt(c++);var d=e<<16|h<<8|k;e=63&d>>18;h=63&d>>12;k=63&d>>6;d&=63;g[l++]="ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/=".charAt(e)+"ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/=".charAt(h)+"ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/=".charAt(k)+"ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/=".charAt(d)}while(c<
a.length);return f=g.join(""),b=a.length%3,(b?f.slice(0,b-3):f)+"===".slice(b||3)}function a2b(a){var b,c,l,f={},g=0,e=0,h="",k=String.fromCharCode,d=a.length;for(b=0;64>b;b++)f["ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/".charAt(b)]=b;for(c=0;d>c;c++)for(b=f[a.charAt(c)],g=(g<<6)+b,e+=6;8<=e;)((l=255&g>>>(e-=8))||d-2>c)&&(h+=k(l));return h}b64e=function(a){return btoa(encodeURIComponent(a).replace(/%([0-9A-F]{2})/g,function(b,a){return String.fromCharCode("0x"+a)}))};
b64d=function(a){return decodeURIComponent(atob(a).split("").map(function(a){return"%"+("00"+a.charCodeAt(0).toString(16)).slice(-2)}).join(""))};
/* <![CDATA[ */
ai_front = {"insertion_before":"BEFORE","insertion_after":"AFTER","insertion_prepend":"PREPEND CONTENT","insertion_append":"APPEND CONTENT","insertion_replace_content":"REPLACE CONTENT","insertion_replace_element":"REPLACE ELEMENT","visible":"VISIBLE","hidden":"HIDDEN","fallback":"FALLBACK","automatically_placed":"Automatically placed by AdSense Auto ads code","cancel":"Cancel","use":"Use","add":"Add","parent":"Parent","cancel_element_selection":"Cancel element selection","select_parent_element":"Select parent element","css_selector":"CSS selector","use_current_selector":"Use current selector","element":"ELEMENT","path":"PATH","selector":"SELECTOR"};
/* ]]> */
var ai_cookie_js=!0,ai_block_class_def="code-block";

a({},c,h);"number"===typeof h.expires&&(h.expires=new Date(Date.now()+864E5*h.expires));h.expires&&(h.expires=h.expires.toUTCString());e=encodeURIComponent(e).replace(/%(2[346B]|5E|60|7C)/g,decodeURIComponent).replace(/[()]/g,escape);var l="",k;for(k in h)h[k]&&(l+="; "+k,!0!==h[k]&&(l+="="+h[k].split(";")[0]));return document.cookie=e+"="+b.write(d,e)+l}}return Object.create({set:g,get:function(e){if("undefined"!==typeof document&&(!arguments.length||e)){for(var d=document.cookie?document.cookie.split("; "):
[],h={},l=0;l<d.length;l++){var k=d[l].split("="),p=k.slice(1).join("=");try{var n=decodeURIComponent(k[0]);h[n]=b.read(p,n);if(e===n)break}catch(q){}}return e?h[e]:h}},remove:function(e,d){g(e,"",a({},d,{expires:-1}))},withAttributes:function(e){return f(this.converter,a({},this.attributes,e))},withConverter:function(e){return f(a({},this.converter,e),this.attributes)}},{attributes:{value:Object.freeze(c)},converter:{value:Object.freeze(b)}})}return f({read:function(b){'"'===b[0]&&(b=b.slice(1,-1));

b),f&&console.log(""),!1}else if("i"==c){g="";e=document.querySelectorAll('span[data-ai-block="'+a+'"]')[0];"aiHash"in e.dataset&&(g=e.dataset.aiHash);e="";b[a].hasOwnProperty("h")&&(e=b[a].h);f&&console.log("AI CHECK block",a,"i cookie hash",e,"code hash",g);if(0==b[a][c]&&e==g)return ai_debug_cookie_status=b="max impressions reached",f&&console.log("AI CHECK block",a,b),f&&console.log(""),!1;if(0>b[a][c]&&e==g){d=new Date;d=-b[a][c]-Math.round(d.getTime()/1E3);if(0<d)return ai_debug_cookie_status=

ai_check_and_insert_block=function(a,f){var b="undefined"!==typeof ai_debugging;if(null==a)return!0;var c=document.getElementsByClassName(f);if(c.length){c=c[0];var g=c.closest("."+ai_block_class_def),e=ai_check_block(a);!e&&0!=parseInt(c.getAttribute("limits-fallback"))&&c.hasAttribute("data-fallback-code")&&(b&&console.log("AI CHECK FAILED, INSERTING FALLBACK BLOCK",c.getAttribute("limits-fallback")),c.setAttribute("data-code",c.getAttribute("data-fallback-code")),null!=g&&g.hasAttribute("data-ai")&&
c.hasAttribute("fallback-tracking")&&c.hasAttribute("fallback_level")&&g.setAttribute("data-ai-"+c.getAttribute("fallback_level"),c.getAttribute("fallback-tracking")),e=!0);c.removeAttribute("data-selector");e?(ai_insert_code(c),g&&(b=g.querySelectorAll(".ai-debug-block"),b.length&&(g.classList.remove("ai-list-block"),g.classList.remove("ai-list-block-ip"),g.classList.remove("ai-list-block-filter"),g.style.visibility="",g.classList.contains("ai-remove-position")&&(g.style.position="")))):(b=c.closest("div[data-ai]"),

f+"-dbg");g=0;for(b=c.length;g<b;g++)e=c[g],e.querySelector(".ai-status").textContent=ai_debug_cookie_status,e.querySelector(".ai-cookie-data").textContent=ai_get_cookie_text(a),e.classList.remove(f+"-dbg")};ai_load_cookie=function(){var a="undefined"!==typeof ai_debugging,f=m(AiCookies.get("aiBLOCKS"));null==f&&(f={},a&&console.log("AI COOKIE NOT PRESENT"));a&&console.log("AI COOKIE LOAD",f);return f};ai_set_cookie=function(a,f,b){var c="undefined"!==typeof ai_debugging;c&&console.log("AI COOKIE SET block:",
a,"property:",f,"value:",b);var g=ai_load_cookie();if(""===b){if(g.hasOwnProperty(a)){delete g[a][f];a:{f=g[a];for(e in f)if(f.hasOwnProperty(e)){var e=!1;break a}e=!0}e&&delete g[a]}}else g.hasOwnProperty(a)||(g[a]={}),g[a][f]=b;0===Object.keys(g).length&&g.constructor===Object?(AiCookies.remove("aiBLOCKS"),c&&console.log("AI COOKIE REMOVED")):AiCookies.set("aiBLOCKS",JSON.stringify(g),{expires:365,path:"/"});if(c)if(a=m(AiCookies.get("aiBLOCKS")),"undefined"!=typeof a){console.log("AI COOKIE NEW",
a);console.log("AI COOKIE DATA:");for(var d in a){for(var h in a[d])"x"==h?(c=new Date,c=a[d][h]-Math.round(c.getTime()/1E3),console.log("  BLOCK",d,"closed for",c,"s = ",Math.round(1E4*c/3600/24)/1E4,"days")):"d"==h?console.log("  BLOCK",d,"delayed for",a[d][h],"pageviews"):"e"==h?console.log("  BLOCK",d,"show every",a[d][h],"pageviews"):"i"==h?(e=a[d][h],0<=e?console.log("  BLOCK",d,a[d][h],"impressions until limit"):(c=new Date,c=-e-Math.round(c.getTime()/1E3),console.log("  BLOCK",d,"max impressions, closed for",
c,"s =",Math.round(1E4*c/3600/24)/1E4,"days"))):"ipt"==h?console.log("  BLOCK",d,a[d][h],"impressions until limit per time period"):"it"==h?(c=new Date,c=a[d][h]-Math.round(c.getTime()/1E3),console.log("  BLOCK",d,"impressions limit expiration in",c,"s =",Math.round(1E4*c/3600/24)/1E4,"days")):"c"==h?(e=a[d][h],0<=e?console.log("  BLOCK",d,e,"clicks until limit"):(c=new Date,c=-e-Math.round(c.getTime()/1E3),console.log("  BLOCK",d,"max clicks, closed for",c,"s =",Math.round(1E4*c/3600/24)/1E4,"days"))):
"cpt"==h?console.log("  BLOCK",d,a[d][h],"clicks until limit per time period"):"ct"==h?(c=new Date,c=a[d][h]-Math.round(c.getTime()/1E3),console.log("  BLOCK",d,"clicks limit expiration in ",c,"s =",Math.round(1E4*c/3600/24)/1E4,"days")):"h"==h?console.log("  BLOCK",d,"hash",a[d][h]):console.log("      ?:",d,":",h,a[d][h]);console.log("")}}else console.log("AI COOKIE NOT PRESENT");return g};ai_get_cookie_text=function(a){var f=m(AiCookies.get("aiBLOCKS"));null==f&&(f={});var b="";f.hasOwnProperty("G")&&
